if.test: searchType == 'name' and keyword != null and keyword != ''
searchType == 'phone' and keyword != null and keyword != ''

mapper.select: SELECT admin_id AS adminId, admin_pw AS adminPw, admin_name AS adminName, admin_role AS adminRole FROM admin WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}

SELECT * FROM event_participant
ORDER BY seq DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN challenge_check_yn = 'Y' OR drive_check_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qrCheckCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN challenge_check_yn = 'N' AND drive_check_yn = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS driveWaitCnt FROM event_participant
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%m.%d') AS regDateStr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant WHERE reg_date >= DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%m.%d')
SELECT IFNULL(NULLIF(car_model, ''), '미지정') AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant GROUP BY car_model ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT IFNULL(NULLIF(test_drive_time, ''), '미지정') AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant WHERE test_drive_time != '시승 미신청' AND test_drive_time IS NOT NULL AND test_drive_time != '' GROUP BY test_drive_time ORDER BY test_drive_time ASC
SELECT IFNULL(NULLIF(shop_info, ''), '미지정') AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant GROUP BY shop_info ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN challenge_check_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS challengeCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN drive_check_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS driveCnt FROM event_participant
